projectDescription: A beautiful CLI tool that shows what's running on your ports, with framework detection, process info, and interactive process management.
keyFeatures: Color-coded port table with framework detection (Next.js, Vite, Django, Rails, and 20+ more)
Docker container identification — maps host ports to container names and images
Interactive process management — kill by port or PID with SIGTERM/SIGKILL
Process health status: healthy, orphaned, and zombie detection
Real-time port watching with change notifications
Developer process listing (ports ps) with CPU%, memory, and uptime
Fast execution (~0.2s) via three batched shell calls
publicApiSurface: ports — list active dev server ports
ports --all — list all listening ports including system services
ports <number> — inspect a specific port with interactive kill prompt
ports kill <port|pid> [-f] — kill process by port or PID
ports ps [--all] — list all running dev processes
ports clean — find and kill orphaned/zombie dev servers
ports watch — real-time port change monitoring
